name: Cory Booker
subject: What Trump did 879 days ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Tonight, Donald Trump is hosting a rally in Orlando to "launch" his campaign for re-election. You want to know the truth? Donald Trump filed the paperwork to launch his re-election campaign the very day he was inaugurated. He started running for re-election 879 days ago for one reason: so he could start raising money. And since then, he's banked over $100 million -- giving him a massive head start over his eventual opponent. I'm beating Trump 47 percent to 42 percent in the most recent polls, but that won't last if he continues to outraise us. **The truth is we don't need to raise more than Trump to win next year, but we can 't afford to get completely blown out in spending.** After this FEC deadline, I want our report to show that we can raise the funds we need to compete -- and win. And I want to show we're building our campaign the right way, rejecting funds from corporate PACs and D.C. lobbyists. Tonight, instead of getting angry following along with a "kickoff" rally filled with hateful rhetoric and blatant lies, join me in doing something productive to help put an end to this presidency. [_**Chip in to support this grassroots campaign before our critical FEC fundraising deadline.**_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190618-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190618_CB_20190618-fr-CB-djtlaunch-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190618-em3?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190618_CB_20190618-fr-CB-djtlaunch-actives_actives_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190618-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190618_CB_20190618-fr-CB-djtlaunch-actives_actives_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_ Thank you -- this election is going to be different, and it starts with you. name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: What's the hangup here?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
We want to run a campaign that's honest with you, and we invite you to be honest with us in return. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717ae/691c9bd/6d8a2d5b/11a4c2e0/2932243317/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

As John is busy preparing for his first presidential debate next week, we're kicking into high gear preparing for the weeks and months to come.

Here's what's absolutely necessary in the next two months:**To qualify for future debates, we need to grow this team to 130,000 strong, which means**[** _we need everyone reading these words to step up right now and chip in to get your support on the record. $1 is enough._**](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190618_TH_20190618-fr-TH-newdonorsurvey-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190618_TH_20190618-fr-TH-newdonorsurvey-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Here comes the fun part: If you didn't click the button above, we would love to hear why. Every piece of feedback we get makes this campaign stronger.

[**_Can you take a moment to share with us why you haven 't yet chipped in $1 to the campaign?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717ae/691c9bd/6d8a2d5b/11a4c21f/2932243317/VEsC/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/wed-love-to-get-you-on-board?source=20190618_1014dnr")

We want to run a campaign that's honest with you, and we invite you to be honest with us in return. We appreciate your thoughts, and look forward to your help in growing this campaign and helping John qualify for future debates.

Thank you,
Team Hickenlooper **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190618_TH_20190618-fr-TH-newdonorsurvey-ndnr_ndnr_b2&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Kamala HQ
subject: Trump’s campaign launch
body:
Donald Trump is officially
launching his re-election campaign in Orlando, Florida tonight.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190618-trump-kickoff?refcode=ema190618-nd&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&t=1001&refcode2=5350_5755789_dICfJl&akid=5350%2E5755789%2EdICfJl ]Let’s show Trump just how powerful our grassroots campaign to elect
Kamala is. Pitch in right now if you want to beat Donald Trump »

Kamala can beat Trump. She has the experience, the talent, and the grit we
need to take the fight directly to Trump in the general election -- and
win.

With recent polls showing Kamala leading Trump by as much as eight points,
and Trump opening new lines of attack on our campaign, it’s clear his team
is worried.

So they’re going to raise and spend a tremendous amount of money to try to
stop our momentum in its tracks.

Trump already has a head start. His campaign has over $100 million in the
bank, along with a network of super PACs and billionaires ready to open up
their checkbooks to keep Trump in the White House.

We don’t have the Trump team’s big super PACs and mega-donors in our
corner. Instead, we have to match them with grassroots power.

Our big FEC deadline is just around the corner, and right now, we’re short
of our goal. With Trump kicking off his campaign tonight, we can’t afford
to fall behind. We need all of our grassroots supporters to pitch in
whatever you can, right now, to catch up:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190618-trump-kickoff?refcode=ema190618-nd&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=5350_5755789_dICfJl&akid=5350%2E5755789%2EdICfJl ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190618-trump-kickoff?refcode=ema190618-nd&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5350_5755789_dICfJl&akid=5350%2E5755789%2EdICfJl ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190618-trump-kickoff?refcode=ema190618-nd&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1006&refcode2=5350_5755789_dICfJl&akid=5350%2E5755789%2EdICfJl ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190618-trump-kickoff?refcode=ema190618-nd&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1007&refcode2=5350_5755789_dICfJl&akid=5350%2E5755789%2EdICfJl ]Another Amount

Thanks for pitching in at this moment. Together, we can build a campaign
with the strength to defeat Donald Trump and elect Kamala.

— Team Kamala

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you’re receiving this email and you’ve given a contribution to Kamala’s
campaign for president, don’t worry: we have you on file. Thanks for your
support!

name: Team Beto
subject: Big Trump announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Donald Trump just launched his reelection campaign. He’s already stoking fear and paranoia — promising to order ICE to begin deporting millions of immigrants starting NEXT week. Beto offers our country a very different path.
#
Trump just launched his 2020 campaign. Help Beto beat him in 2020. Donate now before our FEC fundraising deadline: **[Donate to Beto](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17862?refcode=ema20190618-37378&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=37378%2E444211%2EwdAJQ5)**
---
Donald Trump just launched his reelection campaign.
He’s already stoking fear and paranoia — promising to order ICE to begin deporting _millions_ of immigrants starting NEXT week.
Beto offers our country a very different path. But we can’t underestimate Donald Trump in 2020. After all, he’s already raised $40 million for his campaign.
[Can you donate $3 to Beto right now before our official FEC fundraising deadline? Every donation made before 6/30 will be counted in our official report as we fight to beat Trump in 2020.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17862?refcode=ema20190618-37378&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=37378%2E444211%2EwdAJQ5)
Beto is from El Paso, a city of immigrants, refugees and asylum seekers. A city whose story reflects the story of our nation. He knows the contributions immigrant communities have made to this country, and he has a unique message to contrast with Donald Trump on this key moral issue.
In March, Beto and Trump went head to head with dueling rallies in El Paso. On one hand you had a president determined to inspire fear in the hearts of Americans, painting immigrants as violent criminals. And on the other hand, you had Beto marching alongside more than 10,000 El Pasoans to celebrate immigrant communities, reminding America that El Paso is one of the safest cities not despite, but _because_ of the fact that it is a city comprised of immigrants.
Beto showed us _exactly_ how we’re going to beat Trump. We won’t stoop to the petty politics of division. Instead, we will face the challenges ahead with a renewed sense of courage and optimism.
The latest polls show Beto can beat Trump in a general election. But it’s on us to make him the Democratic nominee.
[Add your $3 donation now. Show Beto we’ve got his back ahead of our important FEC deadline as we gear up to compete with Trump.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17862?refcode=ema20190618-37378&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=37378%2E444211%2EwdAJQ5)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17862?refcode=ema20190618-37378&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=37378%2E444211%2EwdAJQ5)**
Together we will do so much more than just beat Trump in 2020. We will once and for all beat the politics of fear and division, and show America what it looks like to have a president who inspires the best inside of us.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=37378%2E444211%2EwdAJQ5). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

The latest polls show Beto can beat Trump in a general election. But it’s on us to make him the Democratic nominee. Together we will do so much more than just beat Trump in 2020. We will once and for all beat the politics of fear and division, and show America what it looks like to have a president who inspires the best inside of us. \- Team Beto Paid for by Beto for America

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Joan=20Perry=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Early Voting Starts Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joan Perry for Congress, All rights reserved
body:
We need your help to win this fight. Please get out and VOTE! | | | | [ ](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=82ccc576c6&e=0bf1d0f47f)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Today marks the first day of early voting of the Republican Primary Runoff for North Carolina's 3rd Congressional district. **I wanted to say thank you for all of your support thus far and[give you the information you need to vote](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=946d8efa14&e=0bf1d0f47f).**

As I've traveled throughout our district, I have listened to the most pressing needs that are facing our people. I've heard you express a need for a leader with a strong backbone to stand up to DC insiders and fight for conservative values. Our district's representative has a responsibility to support President Trump, limit government, balance the budget, and most importantly protect the unborn. We cannot settle for a representative who takes that responsibility lightly.
This fight won't be won, however, without your help. **We need you to tell your friends, families and colleagues to make a plan to VOTE!**

Find your county's early voting location and times [here](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=9e8999a021&e=0bf1d0f47f). With such extremely low turnout expected, every vote is critical -- every vote!

You'd be surprised how many people think this election is next year or in November. With Election Day on July 9th (after the 4th of July holiday weekend), many voters will be out of town or settling back into work. It's critical that you make a plan to vote. [Find your location here.](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=109ffc5870&e=0bf1d0f47f)

Joan Perry

PS: Tonight is a critical deadline for my next financial report. I need your support to push back on the attacks coming from DC insiders. Will you donate before midnight to help fund my campaign messages [like this one](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=29a15fe2d0&e=0bf1d0f47f)?

name: Team Maggie
subject: news re. birth control access
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc23a/2a380d31/3ed0d6bb/f121ab/830736351/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc23a/2a380d31/3ed0d6bb/f121ab/830736351/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team,
As the Trump administration undermines women's health with efforts to roll back protections that prevent women from being charged extra for birth control, Senator Hassan is doubling down on her efforts to expand it.
Last week, she co-sponsored a bill that would ensure that over-the-counter birth control is affordable, accessible, and covered by insurance without cost sharing and without requiring a prescription.
It's common sense -- by mandating that over-the-counter birth control be completely covered by insurance, this legislation will help ensure that women from all walks of life are able to access affordable contraception, and have control over their bodies and their futures.
**But Senator Hassan is easily the most vulnerable Democrat up for reelection next cycle, and Republicans will use her efforts to protect access to reproductive health care against her.** That's where you come in:
[**Will you please give $3 or however much you can so that Maggie can continue fighting on the front lines? Your donation will make sure that we can keep New Hampshire 's Senate seat in Democratic control and stop Republicans from undoing health care protections for women.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc23a/2a380d31/3ed0d6bb/f12194/830736351/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDYxOV9vdGNiY19STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190619_otcbc_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

name: Warren HQ
subject: Will you chip in $3 to own your piece of this grassroots movement before the first debate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
It's going to take everyone on this team working together to make those plans happen. The first debate marks the beginning of a new phase of the race, and before Elizabeth takes that stage, we need... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e1c1/45c30650/163c91da4/669b2fbb/2837084800/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
One week from tonight, Elizabeth will walk onto the stage of the first Democratic presidential debate.

It's an important opportunity to share our campaign's vision for this country with millions of people across America.

We've got plans for big, structural change -- from Universal Child Care to cancelling student loan debt to making the top 0.1% of Americans pay their fair share in taxes with the Ultra-Millionaire Tax.

**But it 's going to take everyone on this team working together to make those plans happen. The first debate marks the beginning of a new phase of the race, and before Elizabeth takes that stage, we need to have the biggest possible grassroots movement.

[We can't do that without you. Will you chip in $3 to own your piece of this grassroots movement before the first debate?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e1c1/45c30650/163c91da4/669b2fba/2837084800/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNjE5ZW0xLWZ1bGwtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190619em1-full-a")**

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Taking our fight to Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Wow, just got some huge news. In less than 24 hours since kicking off his campaign, Trump raised a whopping $24.8 million for his re-election. [**If you’re ready to take on Trump with me, join the fight for 2020 and donate to our presidential campaign right now »**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190619-trump-fr?refcode=ema190619-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&t=1&refcode2=5354_5755789_Vx4AzI&akid=5354%2E5755789%2EVx4AzI) Polls show that we’re running an eight-point lead in a head-to-head against Trump, and it may be early, but his campaign has already set their targets on us. I expect that they will use this hefty haul of cash to attack us on every front: TV ads, online, at campaign rallies, and more. It might feel impossible to win or that he is unstoppable, but our movement is growing by the day. I’m putting my faith -- as I’ve always done -- with the people. _With us_. Together, we will grow our grassroots support, fight hard to transform our country, and beat Trump. But first, I need your help: We have a major FEC deadline on the horizon and our fundraising numbers will be revealed to Trump’s team. Showing we’re in full force and can go toe-to-toe with him is crucial right now. **That’s why I’m asking you today to add a donation to support our campaign for president and elect a real leader to the White House:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190619-trump-fr?refcode=ema190619-b&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=2&refcode2=5354_5755789_Vx4AzI&akid=5354%2E5755789%2EVx4AzI)

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Trump just broke a record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Look at these shocking stats from Donald Trump’s first 24 hours of his campaign.
#
Donald Trump launched his 2020 campaign last night and he’s already raised a frightening amount of money.
**We can’t allow our Democratic nominee to be heavily outspent in 2020.** So how are we going to beat a sitting president? People power.
Beto has shown what it looks like for hundreds of thousands of people to come together to fund a grassroots campaign $25 at a time. We’ve done it before. ALL people. No PACs, no lobbyists, no special interests.
[Can we count on you in this moment to respond to Trump before our major FEC deadline at the end of this month? Make a donation of $3 now to power our grassroots campaign. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17875?refcode=ema20190619-37485&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=37485%2E444211%2Eyakcyt)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17875?refcode=ema20190619-37485&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=37485%2E444211%2Eyakcyt)**
Trump may have giant super PACs on his sides, but we’ve got _you_ and everyone else reading right now. Emails like this one generate about half of all our campaign fundraising, but only 1-in-100 people reading any given email end up donating. Imagine what would happen if we increased that number three-fold.
**If everyone chips in a little bit right now, we’ll have more than enough money to compete with Donald Trump and win the White House in 2020.**
[Chip in $3 today before our critical FEC deadline.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17875?refcode=ema20190619-37485&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=37485%2E444211%2Eyakcyt)
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=37485%2E444211%2Eyakcyt). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

| | |
# **Ivanka Trump, Wilbur Ross: President Redoubles Efforts to Ensure Good Jobs for All**

“On Tuesday, we were in Charlotte discussing workforce development with local leaders and executives as well as the new opportunities that this economy has brought to the state and region,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross write in the _Salisbury Post_. “With a record 48 states registering unemployment rates below 5%, President Trump’s economic agenda is paying off.”

That said, many of the new jobs American companies are creating require highly skilled workers. “Today’s labor market challenges combined with rapid technological change call for a clear national workforce strategy,” Ms. Trump and Secretary Ross write. As of today, the President’s efforts have resulted in more than 250 companies pledging more than 9 million new opportunities to train and reskill American workers and students.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56b040ed4e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b371585ec1&e=3ee4985eea), former Acting Director of Immigration and Customs Enforcement Thomas Homan writes that President Trump made the right call in ordering the deportation of illegal immigrants—and points out that Democrats were noticeably silent when the Obama Administration did the same in 2015. “The same lawmakers who are quick to criticize ICE officers now have done nothing to address the humanitarian and national security crisis on our border. They have not offered up one idea, one fix, or one dollar of the supplemental budget request that President Trump has made for border security.”
---
|
---
| “The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement looms over the congressional agenda this summer. In recent weeks, officials have rolled up their sleeves and begun to prepare the ground for a positive vote on this landmark trade agreement,” U.S. Chamber of Commerce Executive Vice President Myron Brilliant writes in [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75ca45b703&e=3ee4985eea). “Each day that passes without approving USMCA is a day that [its] benefits are deferred.”
---
|
---
| The Democrat mayor of a Texas town near the U.S.–Mexico border slammed Washington’s neglect of the border crisis, “saying ‘we are sick and tired of the deaf ears’ for failing to protect towns like his from illegal immigration,” Lukas Mikelionis reports for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d4ce1ffc3&e=3ee4985eea). Bruno Lozano, mayor of Del Rio, Texas, said that illegal immigration has overrun his town and urged members of Congress to visit these border towns and witness the situation firsthand.
---
|
---
| “Thanks to President Trump’s economic policies, Pennsylvania’s unemployment recently hit an all-time low of 3.9 percent, while the state’s job count hit a record 6.2 million,” Rep. Guy Reschenthaler (R-PA) writes in the [_Observer-Reporter_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=315f0ec6e2&e=3ee4985eea). “But it’s his rewrite of the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA), known as the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA), that promises to be an even greater boon for our state economy and the nation.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=072e74ed6f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=138995ee11&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=43b6090afe)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: I’m taking a very controversial position…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Team,

I am pro-rule of law. This may not seem like a controversial position, but for many of our elected officials in Washington today, unfortunately it is. Rule of law might not as easy to see as gun violence or climate change. and it's not something easy to measure like our exploding budget deficit or prescription drug prices. But protecting our rule of law is just as fundamental to our country and our democracy.

Those of us who have risked our life overseas for America know that a country is more than a shape on a map. There are values that hold us together that are worth fighting for, including the principle that no one is above the law - even those in the White House.

When this Administration ignores the recommendations of the Office of Government Ethics and does not remove a person who has broken the law numerous times in office, when people who were denied security clearances get them anyway because they are relatives of the President, when the executive branch attacks and undermines the legitimacy of our court system and threatens those who rule against the President, when the DHS Secretary is instructed by the President to break the law, when government officials are openly encouraged to defy congressional subpoenas, or when the President himself says that he is open to committing a felony together with a foreign government in 2020, these are more than just words. These are examples of our democracy being tested, to see whether it will be resilient -- or break under pressure.

Upholding the rule of law should always come before party allegiance. Every member of Congress takes an oath not to a party or a man, but to the Constitution of the United States. And every time that elected officials look the other way on these violations of law, they weaken our democratic institutions and undermine their own legitimacy. Massive interference in our 2016 elections by a hostile foreign power has now been conclusively proven. Not only do partisan extremists like Pete Olson refuse to do anything about it, but he is actively blocking bills to prevent future interference in our elections by foreign powers.

[**If you think that the idea of America is worth fighting for, please add your name to my petition. I need your help to replace someone who doesn't. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i2dbfGEnsul2nq1SQSGL1KEYoZqcXWUIEcauS0AWv0=/PmUHCZkwM-kWaJ9SPjlbGyaGZupN_kaFpiEYheWWq4E=?recipientId=SJ7JhhWU0f5S7IdJ4j2mJ3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i2dbfGEnsul2nq1SQSGL1KEYoZqcXWUIEcauS0AWv0=/PmUHCZkwM-kWaJ9SPjlbGyaGZupN_kaFpiEYheWWq4E=?recipientId=SJ7JhhWU0f5S7IdJ4j2mJ3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Thank you,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i2dbfGEnsul2nq1SQSGL1KEYoZqcXWUIEcauS0AWv0=/0eA5-r-R_6jM0RDpz9avc1AG_zY969BKGVOkDXp3Hjo=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i2dbfGEnsul2nq1SQSGL1KEYoZqcXWUIEcauS0AWv0=/oLKuimBXtMMNnSgOTqmr-PCDdpYIqvN-TTvkkrRKKM8=)

* * *

Sugarland TX 77478 United States

name: Meg, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: “the Democrats’ best hope in Mississippi”
body:
|
---
If you had any doubt about Jim's ability to win this race in November, let Monday's article in the Biloxi Sun Herald put your fears to rest:
**" HOOD IS BATTLE-TESTED"**
\-- _Biloxi Sun Herald_

[**Jim 's won statewide in Mississippi before, and with your help he'll do it again >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pdJBMYLHjS28Rl0Bai-IIda1nUA5DB0yOryv6_3HSSA=/YdJg-ZoXWCUEEcn3Z4s-7aw10keUn4ETXx0Kx4ptB-M=?refcode=20190619&amount=25)
Friend, if you had any doubt about Jim's ability to win this race in November, let Monday's article in the _Biloxi Sun Herald_ put your fears to rest:
_" In four campaigns for the post of attorney general, the state Republican establishment has thrown its heavy artillery into efforts to upend Hood, **who has been left standing** as Mississippi's only statewide elected Democrat."

"Hood's performance in those previous four elections is why he is viewed as **the first Democrat since 2003 to have a legitimate shot of winning** the governor's office..."

"The story for Hood now might be that **he is the Democrats ' best hope in Mississippi** for the office for governor in a long time..."_
---
And it's not just the _Biloxi Sun Herald_ \-- the polls are showing Jim can win too! A recent poll had him 5 points ahead of Tate Reeves -- and his lead _widened_ when voters heard his message to move Mississippi forward.

But this is far from a done deal, friend. **The _Herald_ also said that "the race for governor most likely will mark the first time the Hood campaign will be outspent."** So if Jim's going to win this race, he needs your support!

**Will you make a donation to help Jim keep up the momentum, rally supporters all over the state, and win the governor 's office this November?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Dean Browning's iPhone
subject: FWD: URGENT: UPCOMING DEADLINE
body:
---
| | | | | | Dear Patriot,
I am currently on the campaign trail and I just got an urgent email from Campaign Headquarters that needs to be passed along to you.
They have reminded me that the second quarter fundraising is coming to an end June 30th.
My staff has informed me that they have set a goal of $10,000 to be raised in the next two weeks and I need your help!
Can I count on you to chip in so we can make sure that we reach our goal?
\-- Dean
Sent from my iPhone.
---
| | |
---
| From: Browning for Congress Staff <[staff@browningforcongress.com](mailto:dean@browningforcongress.com)> Subject: FWD: URGENT: UPCOMING DEADLINE Date: June 19, 2019 at 03:21:49 PM To: Dean Browning <dean[@browningforcongress.com](mailto:dean@browningforcongress.com)> Reply-To: <[staff@browningforcongress.com](mailto:dean@browningforcongress.com)>
Dean,
Do not forget! The second quarter fundraising is coming to an end and the FEC Deadline is June 30th.
This is a critical date for our campaign.
We need to end these final two weeks with a strong fundraising effort.
This will show any prospective primary opponents and radical liberal Democrat Susan Wild that we are the only serious conservative contender in this race!
That is why I have set a goal to raise $10,000 in two weeks.
---
| | | [HELP US MEET OUR GOAL](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00198zI9FBNUyMLOAq1VqO8uL51D203R3cnx-BsF0_gPtfOo_ilBjCQroqPtUR-NuFxBl2u-Fc7wSoDlFH5_hqMSVBUjcuHpdOXbzfmtxL2aJBADjMD7pV2YRN6SqW0T1ksSB7Dkl4P1DBsiKNzKHH--qVxl0iPdZXrkYCBDFRAMAgBjaKXGBdv-g==&c=F39umEFOxHdKQNGlTQJG1RFMxvlP3Cd4QmQACH4M3zU9E8zux94cjw==&ch=EisDK3YMlUvnKDt_ouHt7WbH6pt24nsCqLXRjo_ED9AvcPYYJzymlQ==)
---
| It may seem like a lot, trust me I know, but we have to get this done!
Can you forward this note to your grassroots army and ask them for a contribution?
All of your fundraising has been focused on small grassroots donors like all of your supporters and I love this strategy! I truly believe that it is the everyday Pennsylvanians who will help get you elected!
Please ask them to consider making a donation today and forward my note along to their friends and ask them to chip in too!
Remember Dean, even if they have donated before, you are able to donate up to $2,800. I strongly encourage everyone to get as close to that donation limit as possible!
---
| | | [HELP US MEET OUR GOAL](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00198zI9FBNUyMLOAq1VqO8uL51D203R3cnx-BsF0_gPtfOo_ilBjCQroqPtUR-NuFxBl2u-Fc7wSoDlFH5_hqMSVBUjcuHpdOXbzfmtxL2aJBADjMD7pV2YRN6SqW0T1ksSB7Dkl4P1DBsiKNzKHH--qVxl0iPdZXrkYCBDFRAMAgBjaKXGBdv-g==&c=F39umEFOxHdKQNGlTQJG1RFMxvlP3Cd4QmQACH4M3zU9E8zux94cjw==&ch=EisDK3YMlUvnKDt_ouHt7WbH6pt24nsCqLXRjo_ED9AvcPYYJzymlQ==)
---
| With the help and support of individuals like your supporters, I truly believe we can beat Susan Wild and restore conservative values to our district.
It's time we put a stop to the Liberal Elites in Washington!
Together we can make this happen and raise $10,000 before the deadline to show them we mean business!!
Contributions of $500, or even just $100, would bring us that much closer to reaching our goal!
Please let me know what else we can do back at Campaign HQ! Let's win this thing!

For Freedom,
Browning for Congress Staff
---
|
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Derek: Join me in urging the Senate to pass the Equality Act this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I want to tell you about one of the challenges I found in trying housing discrimination cases back in the 1980s in Virginia.
| | Derek:

In the 1980s, I was one of a few attorneys in Virginia who was focused on fair housing. I represented people who had experienced discrimination in their efforts to secure a home -- a serious problem in the United States.

The statistics around housing discrimination are distressing. Even 50 years after the passage of federal protections, a recent report shows that more than 28,000 fair housing complaints were filed in 2017. We clearly have more work to do -- and part of that is enforcing the fair housing provisions that were a part of the Civil Rights Act. That landmark legislation put protections in place that enabled people to seek legal recourse when they experience this discrimination. _But no such protections exist for LGBTQ Americans, who can still legally be discriminated against in housing access, or even legally fired simply for being themselves._

**That's unacceptable, and we can do something about it in Congress.** [**The House passed the Equality Act to prohibit this exact discrimination against LGBTQ people, and now it's up to the Senate to do the same. I'm a proud co-sponsor, and I hope you'll sign my petition to urge my colleagues to pass this critical legislation.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1772/3e0906/7b654f7a/3e3080c6/525787647/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-support-the-equality-act?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+The+House+passed+the+Equality+Act+to+pro&utm_campaign=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act&source=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act")

Derek, one of the challenges I found in trying housing discrimination cases back in the '80s was that, since most of my clients had found a home by the time of their trial, it was difficult for me to convince a jury that real damages had actually been inflicted. Often I would be arguing in front of majority-white or, sometimes, all-white juries, and I could see that they were thinking, "_Yeah it was unfortunate -- but you eventually found a place to live._ "

To show the damage of discriminatory housing practices, I asked a client once to describe what it felt like to be turned down even though she later found a place. She asked the jury to imagine her, a University of Richmond law professor, as a paper resume with all of her accomplishments listed. She then told the jury it felt like the landlord had just crumpled her up and tossed her aside once they found out she was black. She then said that she had worked to pull the thrown away resume out of the trash and un-crumple it.

She could flatten and straighten it out to some degree. But try as she might, she couldn't get it back to where it was before -- the lines and creases from being crumpled and thrown away are still there. That's what being discriminated against does to your soul.

**We've got more to do on every front in the fight against bigotry, hate, and discrimination. Passing legislation that takes steps to address it is a start, and it's something that's within reach right now.**

[**Click here to add your name to my petition and say it's time to pass the Equality Act.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1772/3e0906/7b654f7a/3e3080c5/525787647/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-support-the-equality-act?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+add+your+name+to+my+petiti&utm_campaign=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act&source=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act")

What a meaningful thing it would be to see the Equality Act come to the Senate floor and be passed during Pride Month. I'll certainly do everything I can to make that happen, and I hope you'll join me by speaking up in support of this law.

Thanks,

_Tim_

| ******[**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1772/3e0906/7b654f7a/3e3080c4/525787647/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-support-the-equality-act?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION&utm_campaign=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act&source=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act")******
---

* * *
|

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1772/3e0906/7b654f7a/3e3080d8/525787647/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act&source=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for Tim to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1772/3e0906/7b654f7a/3e3080df/525787647/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act&source=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act")

Team Kaine is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your sustained support is critical to Tim. If you'd like to donate, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1772/3e0906/7b654f7a/3e3080de/525787647/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-support?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act&source=20190619_1_PET_TK_Equality-Act") Thanks for having Tim's back!

Alexandria, VA 22313-0239

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Celebrating Juneteenth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6c1/34a064cc/6f59ced/703ee7a/906737500/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/")

| | | Friend, Today, as we celebrate the abolition of slavery and the emancipation of African Americans in this country on Juneteenth, let us remember that justice is neither inevitable nor guaranteed without our active intervention. On this day in 1865, Union Army General Gordon Granger issued a proclamation in Galveston, Texas declaring freedom for all enslaved people in the state of Texas. Known later as Freedom Day, this day offers us a powerful lesson about the long road to true freedom in America, a road defined by both tragedy and triumph. **If we 're going to build an America that looks like the one we know is possible, we must recommit to the fight for freedom and a future where every voice is heard in our democracy. That work starts by understanding our nation's past. Will you join us in celebrating Juneteenth on social media today?** **[share on twitter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6c1/34a064cc/6f59ced/703ee7b/906737500/VEsE/ "https://twitter.com/intent/retweet?tweet_id=1141381757415112704")** **[share on facebook](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6c1/34a064cc/6f59ced/703ee78/906737500/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/photos/a.1533312410132598/1628133727317132/?type=3&theater")** Although we honor the celebration of Juneteenth, we know too that more than two years prior, Abraham Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation declaring freedom for enslaved people in rebellious states, and that months earlier, Congress passed the 13th amendment abolishing slavery. But an institution as insidious and destructive as slavery could not be eradicated by proclamations alone. In fact, Kentucky and Mississippi would not ultimately ratify the 13th amendment until 1976 and 2013 respectively. Those same two states have elections this year, where we can continue our work for freedom and justice by ensuring every voter can exercise their constitutional right to vote. Today, we celebrate the legacy of freedpeople who did the difficult work to move our country closer to a nation where every person is free and equal. Tomorrow, we honor their memory by continuing our work for voting rights, because too many people continue to experience disenfranchisement and discrimination in the voting booth. Onward,
Team Fair Fight
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6c1/34a064cc/6f59ced/703ee79/906737500/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6c1/34a064cc/6f59ced/703ee86/906737500/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6c1/34a064cc/6f59ced/703ee87/906737500/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

body:

| |
#
Last month Chuck Schumer said, “We’re going to win in Georgia.” **Now, Joe Biden said, “I plan on winning Georgia.”**

It’s clear Georgia is the Democrats’ top target in 2020. **They know that if they defeat President Trump and me, they win the White House and U.S. Senate.**

The only thing standing between them, is us. [**Will you stand with me right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3343043102&e=02cd889ad3)

Biden, Schumer, and other radical Democrats will raise hundreds of millions of dollars to spend in our state. They will do whatever it takes to win. **While they’re counting on radical liberal donors around the country, I have grassroots supporters like you.**

**I know we can win if we stand together. **[**That's why I'm asking you to add your name, and join Team Perdue, right now. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c180414233&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

David

name: Dan Baer
subject: Mitch McConnell just said:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Not a single leading Republican defended Trump's obscene statement... except Mitch McConnell.
|
---

| | I know we send you a lot of emails, so I'll make this quick:

**[Can you chip in $19 before midnight to win my Colorado Senate race to kick Mitch McConnell out of power for good?>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8260a/232dfd1/9648556/62a10916/328660017/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190619_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

President Trump just admitted that he *would* accept help from a foreign power to win the 2020 election.

Not a single leading Republican defended Trump's obscene statement... _**except Mitch McConnell.**_

McConnell immediately downplayed the severity of Trump's threat and switched the blame to Democrats. He said we're "harassing" the President by focusing on his comments, and that we need to leave the issue alone!

It's appalling and it's wrong.

[**That 's why I'm emailing and to ask for $19 and your help to make McConnell regret this brazen attack on our democracy. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8260a/232dfd1/9648556/62a10916/328660017/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190619_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

To stop Mitch McConnell and restore our democracy, we have to take away his Senate Majority. And my Colorado race is our only chance to do that.

Nate Silver and CNN both declared that a Democratic Senate rests entirely on whether or not we win Colorado.

There's too much on the line to lose here: The Supreme Court. Health care. Women's reproductive rights. And in the wake of McConnell's latest comments... the very fabric of our democracy is at risk, too. That's why I'm asking. clean_body: Not a single leading Republican defended Trump's obscene statement... except Mitch McConnell. | | | I know we send you a lot of emails, so I'll make this quick: "" President Trump just admitted that he would accept help from a foreign power to win the 2020 election. Not a single leading Republican defended Trump's obscene statement... except Mitch McConnell. McConnell immediately downplayed the severity of Trump's threat and switched the blame to Democrats. He said we're "harassing" the President by focusing on his comments, and that we need to leave the issue alone! It's appalling and it's wrong. "" To stop Mitch McConnell and restore our democracy, we have to take away his Senate Majority. And my Colorado race is our only chance to do that. Nate Silver and CNN both declared that a Democratic Senate rests entirely on whether or not we win Colorado. There's too much on the line to lose here: The Supreme Court. Health care. Women's reproductive rights. And in the wake of McConnell's latest comments... the very fabric of our democracy is at risk, too. That's why I'm asking. Can you rush in $19 before midnight so we can win my race, flip the Senate, and kick Mitch McConnell out of power for good? | | "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Dan | "" "" Dan for Colorado PO Box 1199 Denver, CO 80201 "" | | Paid for by Dan for Colorado

| | | | | |

| Patriot,
Contrary to what the radical left and mainstream fake news media want you to believe, our President is winning. Since President Trump took office the Democrats have done nothing but try to impede his progress to Make America Great Again but our President has kept his head down and has done what's right for the American people.
As President Trump seeks reelection he needs our help. At every turn, he is met with resistance from the radical left and the mainstream fake news media. We need to send a strong message to the radical left that they will not stifle our President.

| | Roy Moore is back, Peter: Moore -- an accused child molester who was removed from the Alabama Supreme Court for violating a court order -- lost to civil rights lawyer Doug Jones in 2017.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Roy Moore is back, Peter: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d073b/72412298/4249e56a/610190f7/2145578494/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNjE5X1JveU1vb3JlX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1") Moore -- **an accused child molester who was removed from the Alabama Supreme Court for violating a court order** \-- lost to civil rights lawyer Doug Jones in 2017. But Sen. Jones's victory was by less than 2 points -- and if Moore's running again in the 2020 election, there's a chance that Alabama will send him to Washington. _**We need to do everything we can to protect voting rights hero Doug Jones 's seat in the Senate.**_ Jones is up against his biggest FEC End of Quarter deadline. In advance of Roy Moore's announcement tomorrow, the stakes have never been higher -- we need to ensure Doug meets his goal. [**Pitch in today -- we 're contributing to Doug's re-election fund to ensure Roy Moore doesn't get anywhere near Congress >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d073b/72412298/4249e56a/610190f6/2145578494/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNjE5X1JveU1vb3JlX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Pitch+in+today++wersquore+contributing+t&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d073b/72412298/4249e56a/610190f9/2145578494/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNjE5X1JveU1vb3JlX1UxX1gxIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1")

Roy Moore will keep strutting around with his cowboy hat and gun to distract from the real issues -- **he 's an accused sex offender with dangerously right-wing views, and an enemy of voting rights who wants to use a Senate platform to enforce his backwards beliefs nationwide.**
This is the ONLY Democratic-held toss-up race in the nation -- and if Sen. Jones loses, it will be impossible for the Democrats to take back the Senate.
**[Can we count on you to help us as we fight to keep this highly competitive seat blue?>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d073b/72412298/4249e56a/610190fe/2145578494/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNjE5X1JveU1vb3JlX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+help+us+as+we+fig&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190619_RoyMoore_U1_X1")**

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Your NEW sticker is here → Bernie Beats Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
Get yours before they're gone.

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO)
Friends -
We've got a brand new sticker, and we wanted you to be one of the first to see it.
[**Chip in ANY amount today before this month's FEC fundraising deadline to claim your "Bernie Beats Trump" sticker.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/15464?source=em190619-1-60&t=2&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO)
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/15464?source=em190619-1-60&t=3&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO)
[GET YOUR STICKER](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/15464?source=em190619-1-60&t=4&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO)
Last night Trump officially launched his re-election campaign – and poll after poll shows that our movement is the best prepared to defeat him.
Bernie beats Trump. Bernie can transform our country. But he cannot do it alone. It will take all of us together.
By contributing to get your sticker, you'll show you're a part of the movement that will win this primary, beat Donald Trump, and transform our country. How about it?
[**Make a contribution today – before this important FEC deadline – to claim your "Bernie beats Trump" sticker.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/15464?source=em190619-1-60&t=5&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO)
Thanks for being a part of this campaign.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
[GET YOUR STICKER](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/15464?source=em190619-1-60&t=6&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=1756_150750_ZAsxTO&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=10&akid=1756%2E150750%2EZAsxTO).

Tom Cotton is leading Trump's pro-war campaign in the Senate.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7647738/72575713/1560205424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGE4OWM3OS1mMDkyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPa28NbTx4VNNdGllGMn8PG0V0l8WtWscpdE-zH3KXA=&refcode=em190619cotton&ms=em190619cotton&recurring=auto&refcode2=header)

NO WAR WITH IRAN**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7647740/72575715/1560205424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGE4OWM3OS1mMDkyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPa28NbTx4VNNdGllGMn8PG0V0l8WtWscpdE-zH3KXA=&recurring=auto&refcode=em190619cotton&ms=em190619cotton&refcode2=topbtn)
---
Friend,

Warmongers in the Trump administration have been looking for an excuse to start a war with Iran from Day One. Now, they may have found one. Two oil tankers were attacked in the Gulf of Oman, and the U.S. has accused Iran of ordering the attack.

**Tom Cotton is leading Trump's pro-war campaign in the Senate. This week, he called for a “retaliatory military strike” on Iran. Worse, he claims Trump can retaliate without Congress giving authorization.**

**[Add your name right now and tell Tom Cotton: we don't want war with Iran!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7647741/72575716/1560205424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGE4OWM3OS1mMDkyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPa28NbTx4VNNdGllGMn8PG0V0l8WtWscpdE-zH3KXA=&refcode=em190619cotton&ms=em190619cotton&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1)**

This is an incredibly dangerous moment in the world. A conflict in the Gulf of Oman could quickly escalate to full-out war with Iran and throughout the region. We could find ourselves in another endless war with thousands of American deaths and no exit plan.

Instead of looking out for America's best interests, Tom Cotton wants to play the tough guy and kowtow to the war hawks in the Trump administration.

**If Tom Cotton wanted healthcare and good wages for the people of Arkansas half as much as he wants war with Iran, he'd be a pretty good Senator. But he doesn't. And he's not.**

**[Add your name and tell Cotton: No more wars, Tom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7647742/72575717/1560205424?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGE4OWM3OS1mMDkyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPa28NbTx4VNNdGllGMn8PG0V0l8WtWscpdE-zH3KXA=&refcode=em190619cotton&ms=em190619cotton&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta2)**

Not again,

Team Mahony

| | Josh Mahony is a native Arkansan, non-profit leader and small business owner. He's running to replace Tom Cotton and make sure everyday Arkansans have a voice in the Senate. If you want a senator who speaks for you and isn't bought and paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting. [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7647743/72575718/501423356?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGE4OWM3OS1mMDkyLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPa28NbTx4VNNdGllGMn8PG0V0l8WtWscpdE-zH3KXA=&refcode=em190619cotton&ms=em190619cotton&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox)
---

Mahony for Senate
P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702

body:
Team,
We hear a lot about who's up or down in the polls, and words like "electability."
I want everyone reading this to know that none of that matters right now. Ignore that noise.
**You** have a choice. **You** have a say. **You** have a vote.
And I will do everything I can to earn it.
Cory

body:
If all of our supporters get one friend to donate, we'll qualify for the debates today. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mikegravel/buttons-209753?e=85f7472d66)
---
| | We're rolling out a new rewards program. Depending on how many people you convince to donate to Mike, you'll get these rewards:

**PEBBLE (5+ people)** : free Gravel 2020 enamel pin
**ROCK (15+ people)**: free pin + included in thank-you video from Sen. Gravel
**BOULDER (25+ people)** : all of the above + free merch item
**GRAVELANCHE (40+ people)** : all of the above + personal phone call from Sen. Gravel

Make sure that the people you convince give credit to you on the donation page! And email [volunteer@mikegravel.org](mailto:volunteer@mikegravel.org) when you meet the criteria.

Here's one quick way to earn these rewards: share our donation button! If just one in two of you convince another person to donate, _Mike will qualify for July_. We're nearly 50,000 strong already. Use the links below to share and we can get the 65,000 donors we need **TODAY! **

name: Kamala Store
subject: You gotta see this Kamala poster…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Have you seen our brand-new, exclusive Kamala poster? It’s stunning! It dropped yesterday in our online store, and if you haven’t seen it yet, it’s an incredible reminder of who Kamala and our campaign fight for every day: _the people_. **[Take a peek here and then add your order to grab your official poster right now »](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/10980?t=1&akid=5360%2E5755789%2ESveAGd)** | | [ shop now ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/10980?t=2&akid=5360%2E5755789%2ESveAGd)
---
We agree that it looks like a powerful movie poster of a superhero (coming to a White House near you), but truthfully you can hang this poster just about anywhere in your home, dorm room, classroom -- or, you can give it to someone close as a special gift.
**[Our stock is running low with this first round of orders, so reserve yours now and we’ll send it directly to your address -- it’s that easy!](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/10980?t=3&akid=5360%2E5755789%2ESveAGd)**
Thanks for all you do.
— Team Kamala

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

name: alert@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: What will you do to stop more Trump-appointed judges?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We must be united in strategy and action on this.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-pet-june?refcode=rtw_20190619_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, we have no time to waste here.

**Mitch McConnell and the GOP-controlled Senate just confirmed _another_ of Donald Trump's hand-picked selections for a lifetime appointment to the federal bench: Matthew Kacsmaryk.**

Matthew Kacsmaryk's anti-choice and homophobic comments tell us that his personal bias makes him unable to uphold precedent as a federal judge. His nomination is a serious threat to reproductive justice and LGBTQ+ rights.

More than 115 Trump-appointed judges are serving lifetime appointments. This is one of the most dangerous pieces of Trump's legacy, and we know he has plans to confirm even more anti-choice, anti-worker, and anti-environment judges in the months ahead.

**Tina is leading the fight against Trump 's radical judges in the Senate -- but she needs to know you have her back in this fight. [Will you add your name to join Tina in stopping Trump's extremist hand-picked selections?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fcbc/c1f7015/62ee8cca/114740ae/2702229705/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201906_judges?source=rtw_20190619_em-full")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fcbc/c1f7015/62ee8cca/114740ae/2702229705/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201906_judges?source=rtw_20190619_em-full")** We will see many more nominations for lifetime appointments in front of the Senate and even possibly another Supreme Court seat. Democrats must be united in strategy and action on this -- and that's why we're coming to you today. **[Add your name now to join Tina's fight against Trump's anti-choice, anti-environment, and anti-LGBTQ+ judges. We need everyone standing up to protect our progressive values.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fcbc/c1f7015/62ee8cca/114740ae/2702229705/VEsC/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201906_judges?source=rtw_20190619_em-full")** Thank you, Team Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-pet-june?refcode=rtw_20190619_em-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

clean_body: We must be united in strategy and action on this. | "=" Friend, we have no time to waste here. Mitch McConnell and the GOP-controlled Senate just confirmed another of Donald Trump's hand-picked selections for a lifetime appointment to the federal bench: Matthew Kacsmaryk. Matthew Kacsmaryk's anti-choice and homophobic comments tell us that his personal bias makes him unable to uphold precedent as a federal judge. His nomination is a serious threat to reproductive justice and LGBTQ+ rights. More than 115 Trump-appointed judges are serving lifetime appointments. This is one of the most dangerous pieces of Trump's legacy, and we know he has plans to confirm even more anti-choice, anti-worker, and anti-environment judges in the months ahead. Tina is leading the fight against Trump 's radical judges in the Senate -- but she needs to know you have her back in this fight. "" "" We will see many more nominations for lifetime appointments in front of the Senate and even possibly another Supreme Court seat. Democrats must be united in strategy and action on this -- and that's why we're coming to you today. "" Thank you, Team Tina | U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race NBC News has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back. ""

name: Rosy Gonzalez Speers
subject: checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Florida Action,
body:
We know Florida is critical to Donald Trump's path to victory in 2020, and they know it, too.
Just wanted to make sure you saw Andrew's message yesterday about why this is such a critical moment, as Donald Trump just kicked off his presidential campaign last night here in Florida.

Guess what their team was doing?

**They were registering tons of people to vote, hoping they will carry them across the finish line here in Florida, sending Trump back to the White House for another four years. Listen, we know Florida is critical to Donald Trump's path to victory in 2020, and they know it, too.**

That's why I'm asking you to pitch in $5 or more today to show them that we can count on committed supporters like you to provide the resources we need to register and reengage a million voters to flip Florida blue and defeat Trump.

Click on this link to make a contribution, so I can tell Andrew that he can count on you to help move our nation forward: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3597/9e00690/6a4d4f8d/24071e77/1150824237/VEsH/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatefwdflaaction&utm_campaign=061919-es-trump-in-fla-kicker-fr&source=061919-es-trump-in-fla-kicker-fr")**

Rosy
Executive Director
Forward Florida Action

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Andrew Gillum**
Date: Tue, Jun 18, 2019 at 5:12 PM
Subject: there will be consequences

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3597/9e00690/6a4d4f8d/24071e76/1150824237/VEsE/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=-em-header-logo&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=061919-es-trump-in-fla-kicker-fr&source=061919-es-trump-in-fla-kicker-fr") Donald Trump is about to host his re-election kickoff rally today, right here in Florida. We must stand up and show him that he's not welcome here, and he's not welcome in the White House.

We're not only speaking out, we're organizing, and we're building the infrastructure we need to register and reengage a million voters in Florida. Because we must succeed in our mission, no matter what obstacles they will place in our path.

**The truth is, there's nothing Trump can do to stop us from achieving our goal. The only thing that will stop us from flipping Florida blue and defeating Trump is if we're not all in to move our nation forward.**

**[Let's show Trump that he doesn't just have to be afraid of @'ing me on Twitter, he has to be afraid of you, and what we can accomplish together. If you're committed to flipping Florida blue and defeating Trump, there's no better time to make your first contribution than right now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3597/9e00690/6a4d4f8d/24071e09/1150824237/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ _[Express Donate: $50](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3597/9e00690/6a4d4f8d/24071e0d/1150824237/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck5DQjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+Express+Donate++ask4+&utm_campaign=061919-es-trump-in-fla-kicker-fr&source=061919-es-trump-in-fla-kicker-fr")_ _[Donate another amount.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3597/9e00690/6a4d4f8d/24071e0c/1150824237/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=061919-es-trump-in-fla-kicker-fr&source=061919-es-trump-in-fla-kicker-fr")_ Trump thinks he can get away with anything without any consequences, and it's up to us to show him the truth that there will be consequences for his actions.

We can flip Florida blue and defeat Trump once and for all, but only if we're in this together.

Let's show him what we can do.

Forward.

Andrew Gillum

subject: Trip for two to the debate (donate and win)

body:
It’s your last chance. We’re selecting a winner (and a friend) to come to Miami for the Democratic debate. You’ll get: 2 plane tickets, 2 nights at a hotel, and 2 tickets to the debate.
#
It’s your last chance.
We’re selecting a winner (and a friend) to come to Miami for the Democratic debate. You’ll get: 2 plane tickets, 2 nights at a hotel, and 2 tickets to the debate.
**⬇ All you have to do to enter is donate ANY amount to Beto right now. ⬇**
[Donate any amount now to win a trip for two to meet Beto and attend the Democratic presidential debate in Miami.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17883?refcode=ema20190619-37546&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=37546%2E444211%2Ej2WOqh) **[Enter to win>> ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17883?refcode=ema20190619-37546&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=37546%2E444211%2Ej2WOqh)**
---
This contest closes soon, so it’s important to send your donation today before the clock runs out. Our whole team is pumped for Beto’s big debate, and we can’t wait to surprise one of you with the trip of a lifetime.
\- Team Beto

* * *
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter to win. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. on June 19, 2019. [You may enter by making a donation here.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17883?refcode=ema20190619-37546&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=37546%2E444211%2Ej2WOqh) Alternatively, you can [enter](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/debate-raffle/?t=22&akid=37546%2E444211%2Ej2WOqh) without making a donation. Entry is limited to one per person.
One winner will receive the following prize package: two round-trip airline tickets to Miami, Florida, at a total value, including taxes, of no more than $1,300; two nights in a Miami hotel, at a total value, including taxes, of no more than $500; two tickets to the Democratic Debate on June 26 or 27; in-town transportation costs up to $200, to be reimbursed by Sponsor, provided receipts are submitted to info@betoorourke.com by July 31, 2019.
Total prize value not to exceed $2,000. Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. Promotion open to all U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 United States and District of Columbia and 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17832?t=23&akid=37546%2E444211%2Ej2WOqh). Sponsor: BETO FOR AMERICA, PO BOX 3628, EL PASO, TX 79923.

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=37546%2E444211%2Ej2WOqh). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: research@andybeshear.com
subject: Andy needs to hear from you (health care)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
While Andy is fighting a court ruling that could end health care coverage for 1.3 million Kentuckians, Matt Bevin is trying to gut our Medicaid program.
|
---
[ ](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b7d/ad6dc73/15117584/db41a57/1149217701/VEsH/ "https://andybeshear.com/")

| | | **Andy Beshear 's
Kentucky Health Care Survey **

_5 Questions
2 Minutes to Complete
Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com_ | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b7d/ad6dc73/15117584/db41a54/1149217701/VEsE/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/VRCQ5ZK")**
---

Peter,

While Andy is fighting in court to preserve Kentuckians' access to affordable care, **Matt Bevin is trying to let health insurance companies get away with selling cut-rate plans that don 't even cover preexisting conditions, prescription drugs or mental health care**. That's on top of Bevin's efforts to gut Kentucky's Medicaid program and throw hundreds of thousands of families off their insurance.

Bevin's callous actions threaten to reverse the significant progress we've made in Kentucky since the Affordable Care Act passed. **We have reduced our uninsured rate from 20 percent in 2010 to just 7.5 percent today** \-- the largest reduction in the country!

But if Bevin gets his way, Medicaid enrollment would plummet and **nearly 100,000 people would lose their coverage**. And even Kentuckians who have insurance could be denied coverage for services deemed "nonessential."

As governor, Andy will put a stop to the nonsense. He'll halt Bevin's effort to throw Kentuckians off the Medicaid program on day one, and **he 'll work to get protections for essential health benefits passed into state law**.

**But Andy wants to hear from you too.[What do you think about Matt Bevin's plan to kick families off their health insurance? Will you take Andy's survey and let him know?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b7d/ad6dc73/15117584/db41a54/1149217701/VEsF/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/VRCQ5ZK")**
| **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b7d/ad6dc73/15117584/db41a54/1149217701/VEsC/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/VRCQ5ZK")**
---

Thanks,
Beshear Research Team

| **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b7d/ad6dc73/15117584/db41a55/1149217701/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?refcode=20190619db__132__&amount=10")**
---

name: Ted Budd
subject: Will you join me in supporting border security?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Congress
body:
| | | | Can't see images? [Click here...](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMTgyMTAxMDI2MTExNDkzMzkwJmM9dTlmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTgxNzM0NDYmZD13NWk5ejR0.sE35IWwMF4hf2uqQom5j9o9PyalcICgQAZFJdu_BvkQ)
---|---|---
|
---
---
| Friend, Recent reports regarding our southern border are _staggering_. One report indicates that over 1 million illegal immigrants will try to cross our border this year. Another report indicated that ISIS recently plotted to send terrorists into America through unsecured portions of our southern border. It’s time that we stepped up and secured our border – because American national security is under constant attack. **If anything is clear about this crisis, it’s that leaving our border unsecured is dangerous and reckless.** Congressional Democrats – who will do anything to avoid action on our border, in the name of silly political games – must be held accountable. **I won’t stand for Congressional inaction, and I won’t stand for their political games.** **In fact, in just two years in Congress, I’ve co-sponsored legislation for border security which funds the wall, ends sanctuary cities, and eliminates immigration loopholes – because inaction is simply not an option anymore.** [Will you stand with me for this critical issue by contributing $50 to join my _Border Security Coalition_?](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMTgyMTAxMDI2MTExNDkzMzkwJmM9dTlmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTgxNzM0NDgmZD1nM2IybzZm.NUPHdLTBDG2UZO3Z8UvBZFWDJo7lHQqD7OPmmXBuXGM) [**Our border security can’t wait – which is why I need to know if you’re with me in our fight right now.**](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMTgyMTAxMDI2MTExNDkzMzkwJmM9dTlmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTgxNzM0NTAmZD1tMW8zbTVj.A9kv--KlxTJKzWG-mI3tkfXkff_880Tt9PwPeOfuTyw) [You can donate to support border security today, right here: tedbudd.com/donate](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMTgyMTAxMDI2MTExNDkzMzkwJmM9dTlmNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNTgxNzM0NTImZD1mMW42dDZl.kCJJHBN284G363ilHmdfruKTrZK8tEaGtjujgXB0o5g)

If we don't reach our goal by June 30, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.
